THETREASURER-STARTER_RESIN_PRESS.title: Resin Press
THETREASURER-STARTER_RESIN_PRESS.descrip: At the start of combat, create a random common resin Relic.
THETREASURER-KEEPSAKE.title: Keepsake
THETREASURER-KEEPSAKE.description: At end of combat, a random resin relic does not break.
THETREASURER-KEEPSAKE.flavor: Some things are too precious to let go.
